title: 📜 Divine Language Recursion
name: Divine Language Recursion
what_it_is: Languages that refer to themselves while speaking the cosmos—recursive linguistic constructs that encode sacred structures in their syntax.
how_to_use: each sentence she speaks curls inward—language folding back into itself, defining what it names
his glyphs mean what they say by repeating what they are
animation_behavior: Words rotate inward, phrases loop into themselves, syntax recursively blossoms ---
